name: lunaris
title: Lunaris
description: Check Genshin Impact character, weapon & artifact information via Lunaris

commands.name: list-banners
commands.title: Banners
commands.description: Lists current and previous banner information
commands.subtitle: Lunaris

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1

author: sphygmus

preferences.label: Show Unreleased Content
preferences.description: Display content that was not released yet
